basics.title: Emwi Ni Bẹ Ghe
basics.country_hint: Ọ ya rhan igho ne ọ khin ebe ne a gha kẹ vbe ẹrọ
basics.gender_placeholder: De vbe u ya ghee ọ?

privacy.title: Ẹhẹn
privacy.friends_only_desc: Ẹvbo ne u haɗa ya de ne iran gha ghee profailu ẹre.
privacy.everyone_desc: Ẹvbo hia vbe Mingla gha mwẹ ọ ghee profailu ẹre.
privacy.nobody_desc: U i gha khian. Ọghe i gha ghee profailu ẹre — ọse ẹhẹn hia.
privacy.show_activity_on: Ọre gha ghee emwi ne u ya ru.
privacy.show_activity_off: A ya bọ emwi ne u ru ne ẹvbo hia.

notifications.title: Ehe Ne A Rhan Ẹmwẹ
notifications.push_hint: Mwẹ ẹmwẹ push vbe ẹrọ ẹre
notifications.friends_pairing_hint: Ẹmwẹ ọre, ẹmwẹ ihaɗa, ne emwi ne ọ gha gbe vbe ẹvbo
notifications.link_requests_hint: Ne ọghe hẹnmwẹ ne ọ gha haɗa profailu ya ne ẹre uwẹ
notifications.messages_hint: Ẹmwẹ ne a ya tiẹ ne ọ khin ẹmwẹ ẹghẹ
notifications.sessions_hint: Itiẹ, emwi ne ọ gha gbe vbe ẹvbo, ne emwi bọọdụ
notifications.tips_hint: Ido, ẹmwẹ ọse, ne emwi ne a kẹ
notifications.error_update: I gha rhan ehe ne a rhan ẹmwẹ.

quiet_hours.title: Ẹghẹ Ifuẹko
quiet_hours.label: Ẹghẹ Ifuẹko
quiet_hours.messages_hint: Giẹ ẹmwẹ ne a ya tiẹ vbe 10 PM - 8 AM
quiet_hours.error_update: I gha rhan ehe ne a rhan ẹghẹ ifuẹko.

delete.title: Ehe Ewu
delete.warning: Ẹre na ma ya rhan emwi ẹre, bọọdụ ẹre, ne itan ẹre kua hia. I gha rhan ẹre gha.
delete.confirm_body: Irhan akaụntụ ẹre kua ma ya rhan emwi hia kua — profailu ẹre, bọọdụ, ihaɗa, ne emwi ne u ru. I gha rhan ẹre gha.
delete.deleting_title: Ọ mu ma aro ne u ya rre kua
delete.deleting_body: A ya ya emwi ẹre a ya bọ ehe.
delete.success_body: U re gha rre gha ẹghẹ ne ọ khin. A ma ya giẹ ọghọ.
delete.success_sub: A ya mu ọ rre kua nẹ. Rrie ọ sẹ.
delete.error_default: Emwi ọkpa i gha khin vbe ọ ma. Kpaye ke gberra.
delete.error_must_sign_in: U ma gha wọlọ sẹ u gha rhan akaụntụ ẹre kua.
delete.error_timeout: Ẹre na ya ẹghẹ ne ọ bu ne a re tẹ. Ọ khin ne a te rhan akaụntụ ẹre kua — gberra khui ke ruẹ ẹrọ.

pickers.birthday_future: Ẹdẹ ibie i gha khin vbe ẹghẹ ne ọ dee.

country_confirm_body: Irhan gha {{country}} ma ya rhan igho ẹre gha {{currency}} ({{symbol}}) ne ebe ne a gha kẹ gha {{measurement}}. Kpaye?
error_update: Irhan i ru ẹre. Kpaye ke gberra.
close_accessibility: Khui ehe ne a rhan akaụntụ
